_comment: Per-asset size budgets for production dist/. Bytes uncompressed. Matched against dist/assets/ files by stem prefix (vite hashes filenames). A budget can list multiple acceptable stems if vite splits chunks; the script asserts each stem's total bytes <= max_bytes. Total budget asserts the sum across all dist/assets/ files. Update consciously when a planned feature genuinely needs more.

per_stem.note: TypeScript host bundle + style.css. Procedural Canvas2D renderer + WHS croft ports + door-launch + pointer-drive.
WASM kernel from crates/hub-wasm. Houses hub-core sim + boundary.

paint._comment: Paint-timing budgets in milliseconds, asserted against the MEDIAN of N=3 samples to absorb single-run jitter. Measured by scripts/smoke-paint-timing.mjs against vite preview on localhost — these are LAB numbers, not field numbers. Headroom: real Cloudflare-served numbers on a fast connection are typically half these budgets, on a slow 3G connection 3-5x. The budgets here are tuned for chromium-headless on a GitHub-hosted runner (slowest reasonable environment in the gate set).
